title: Oh Happy Life!
excerpt: It looks like my newest collection with American Crafts has hit stores! Check your local scrapbook stores as well as Simon Says Stamp , Blue Moon Scrapbooking , Scrapbook.com . Oh Happy Life is inspired by an appreciation for both…
body:
It looks like my newest collection with American Crafts has hit stores! Check your local scrapbook stores as well as Simon Says Stamp, Blue Moon Scrapbooking, Scrapbook.com.

Oh Happy Life is inspired by an appreciation for both the little and big things that make our lives the best they can be. You'll see a lot of positive and uplifting phrases along with whimsical and random hand drawn elements thrown in. It's an everyday collection inspired by living your best creative life. 

Made this little video walk through of the collection:

Planning on sharing lots of projects using these products on the blog and in videos. Cannot wait to see how you all use the products. Please be sure to not only tag me but also include #amytangerine and #ATohhappylife on Instagram so we can all check out your creativity! Would love to hear what you want to see - please leave any requests in the comments below.

Oh Happy Life can be found at many local scrapbook stores and online at: Simon Says Stamp |
Blue Moon Scrapbooking | Scrapbook.com
